description: Product Description Long Sleeve Onesies for Baby Grows Newborn-12 Month Designed for sleep or play, this is a baby wardrobe essential! BINIDUCKLING valued customer experience very much, and we has been dedicated to designing and manufacturing high quality baby clothing. All our concern is to bring your baby a warm and cozy sleeper pajamas, and bring a good night's sleep. We see every baby in BINIDUCKLING as a star in the sky and needs to be taken care of. Size ranging: 3-12 month Colors：14 various solid colors. Machine wash, warm water, colors separately, do not bleach. Why Choose BINIDUCKLING Baby Snap-Up Sleepsuit ? Ultra Soft, Cozy and Comfortable 95% Cotton, 5% Spandex Made with high-quality cotton, safe, breathable and comfortable, it gentle on baby's sensitive skin Tag-less design Tag-less design & itch-free,skin-friendly, loose fit and stretchy Great Baby Shower Gift Perfect for 3-12 months baby birthdays and Christmas gift Material - 95% Cotton, 5% Spandex Closure - Snap-on Button Note: Measure your Baby before Purchasing Snap-Up Sleepsuits Prime Features: Designed with Snap-Up Closure Front/Side open from neckline to ankle, easy to wear and take off, make diaper changing easier. Reversible Mittens Design with fold over cuff/mitten, preventing the baby from scratching themselves Design with Footies Keep baby's foot warm, also great for baby's on the play and sleep. Durable Stitching Smooth wrapped edge, close and neatly flat-lock seams How To Choose The Size (inches): 0-3 Months Length 18.5"---Bust 20.5"---Sleeve Length 8.7"---Hip 21.3" 3-6 Months Length 20.9"---Bust 21.3"---Sleeve Length 9.1"---Hip 22.0" 6-9 Months Length 23.2"---Bust 22.0"---Sleeve Length 9.4"---Hip 22.8" 9-12 Months Length 25.6"---Bust 22.8"---Sleeve Length 10.2"---Hip 23.6"
